utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items required in the final format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with costs and relevant details: 1) health_coverage: includes a plan name, monthly cost (€100/month), policy number, and description of coverage scope. Includes costs, so fully specified. 2) property_coverage: describes 'Photography Equipment Insurance' with cost (€40/month) and coverage scope; however, it should be 'home/contents insurance with costs' per the requested format. The provided item is equipment insurance rather than home/contents insurance, so it does not match the required coverage type even though it has a cost; therefore not fully specified per the required format. 3) travel_coverage: states that international coverage is included in the health plan and describes scope, but it does not include explicit costs for travel insurance (just says included). The format requires 'travel insurance with costs'; without a cost, it's incomplete. 4) additional_services: provides two services with explicit monthly costs and coverage details; this meets 'any enhancement services with costs.' Fully specified. 5) total_budget: provides monthly and annual totals and payment details; fully specified. Therefore, 3 out of 5 items are fully specified according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists: LifeFirst Standard Health Plan (€100/month) for health; Photography Equipment Insurance (€40/month) under property; travel coverage stated as included in LifeFirst Standard Health Plan; and additional services: Professional Liability and Business Liability (not present in the ground-truth options list). We must map only items that exist in the ground-truth ratings. In the ground-truth, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' appears under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 9, and under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 9. The property item 'Photography Equipment Insurance' is not listed in the ground-truth property_protection (which lists home content coverages like InsurePlus Standard Coverage, LifeFirst Standard Coverage, etc.), so it cannot be mapped. The additional services (Professional Liability, Business Liability) also do not exist in the ground-truth dataset. Therefore, we can map two items: the LifeFirst health plan to its physical health rating (9), and the travel coverage described as LifeFirst Standard Health Plan to the LifeFirst travel insurance rating (9).
